---
title: "test_runecaster_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_runecaster_empire.py"
loc: 50
complexity: 3
logic_score: 4.02
style_score: 3.65
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.53
---

## Intent
The `test_runecaster_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestRuneCasterEmpire, mock_root, test_scan_perfect_file, test_scan_missing_args, test_scan_missing_return, test_scan_strict_init, test_scan_weak_generics. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestRuneCasterEmpire, mock_root, test_scan_perfect_file, test_scan_missing_args, test_scan_missing_return, test_scan_strict_init, test_scan_weak_generics. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.runecaster](file://src.sentinel.wardens.runecaster)

### Exports
- `TestRuneCasterEmpire`
- `mock_root`
- `test_scan_perfect_file`
- `test_scan_missing_args`
- `test_scan_missing_return`
- `test_scan_strict_init`
- `test_scan_weak_generics`
